title: Thrikodithanam Mahavishnu Temple
tagline: Thrikodithanam Mahavishnu Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Thrikodithanam Mahavishnu Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu and located in Thrikkodithanam, Kottayam District, Kerala, South India.
overview.description: Thrikodithanam Mahavishnu Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu and located in Thrikkodithanam, Kottayam District, Kerala, South India. Constructed in the Kerala style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desam dedicated to Krishna, an avatar of Vishnu, who is worshipped as Mahavishnu. The nearest railway station to the temple is located in Changanassery, while the nearest airport is Cochin International Airport. It is one of the five ancient

topPlaces.name: Thrikkodithanam
topPlaces.description: Thrikkodithanam is a village in Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India. It is located on the outskirts of Changanassery Municipality.

topPlaces.name: Kalarickal Manikanda Swami Temple
topPlaces.description: Kalarickal Manikanda Swami temple is an ancient temple in Thrikkodithanam village in Kottayam District, Kerala, India. Lord Siva is the main prathista (idol).

topPlaces.name: Paippad Puthenkavu Bhagavathi Temple
topPlaces.description: Paippad Puthenkavu Bhagavathi Temple is an ancient Bhagavathi shrine located at Paippad, Changanacherry, in Kottayam, Kerala, India. It is situated at Paippad, on Changanacherry – Kaviyoor road and 5 km away from Changanacherry.

topPlaces.name: Muttar
topPlaces.description: Muttar is a village in upper Kuttanad, Alappuzha district of Kerala, India. It is located 10 km west of Thiruvalla on the Kidangara Neerattupuram (Muttar Central) road, surrounded by Thalavady, Neerettupuram, Kunnamkary, Chathamkary & Mithrakary.

topPlaces.name: Perunna Subrahmanya Swami Temple
topPlaces.description: Perunna Subrahmanya Swami Temple is a Hindu temple located at Perunna neighbourhood in Changanacherry. The deity of the temple is Subrahmanya Swami (Kartikeya), one of the three sons of Lord Shiva.

topPlaces.name: St. Mary's Metropolitan Cathedral, Changanassery
topPlaces.description: St. Mary's Metropolitan Cathedral, also known as Valiyapally, is the cathedral of the Syro-Malabar Catholic Archeparchy of Changanassery (Archieparchia Changanacherrensis) and also a Marian pilgrimage centre in Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Archeparchy of Changanacherry
topPlaces.description: The Syro-Malabar Catholic Archeparchy of Changanacherry (Syriac: ܐܦܪܟܝܐ ܪܒܬܐ ܕܫܢܓܢܐܣܐܪܐ, romanized: Afarkaya Rabbta d-Shanganasara; Malayalam: ചങ്ങനാശ്ശേരി അതിരൂപത, romanized: Changanassery Atirūpata) is a Syro-Malabar Church archeparchy of the Catholic Church with an area of 24,595 km2 comprising the districts of Kottayam(excluding Vaikom), Alappuzha(excluding Cherthala), Pathanamthitta, Kollam, and Thiruvananthapuram in Kerala, and also Kanyakumari district in Tamil Nadu. It is one of the largest Catholic dioceses in India in terms of area.

topPlaces.name: Paippad
topPlaces.description: Paippad is a vibrant Census Town and Gram Panchayat in the Changanassery Taluk of the Kottayam District in the Indian state of Kerala. It is part of the Changanassery urban agglomeration.

items.note: Thrikkodithanam is a village in Kottayam district in the state of Kerala, India. It is located on the outskirts of Changanassery Municipality.
Kalarickal Manikanda Swami temple is an ancient temple in Thrikkodithanam village in Kottayam District, Kerala, India. Lord Siva is the main prathista (idol).

Paippad Puthenkavu Bhagavathi Temple is an ancient Bhagavathi shrine located at Paippad, Changanacherry, in Kottayam, Kerala, India. It is situated at Paippad, on Changanacherry – Kaviyoor road and 5 km away from Changanacherry.

Muttar is a village in upper Kuttanad, Alappuzha district of Kerala, India. It is located 10 km west of Thiruvalla on the Kidangara Neerattupuram (Muttar Central) road, surrounded by Thalavady, Neerettupuram, Kunnamkary, Chathamkary & Mithrakary.
Perunna Subrahmanya Swami Temple is a Hindu temple located at Perunna neighbourhood in Changanacherry. The deity of the temple is Subrahmanya Swami (Kartikeya), one of the three sons of Lord Shiva.

St. Mary's Metropolitan Cathedral, also known as Valiyapally, is the cathedral of the Syro-Malabar Catholic Archeparchy of Changanassery (Archieparchia Changanacherrensis) and also a Marian pilgrimage centre in Kerala, India.

The Syro-Malabar Catholic Archeparchy of Changanacherry (Syriac: ܐܦܪܟܝܐ ܪܒܬܐ ܕܫܢܓܢܐܣܐܪܐ, romanized: Afarkaya Rabbta d-Shanganasara; Malayalam: ചങ്ങനാശ്ശേരി അതിരൂപത, romanized: Changanassery Atirūpata) is a Syro-Malabar Church archeparchy of the Catholic Church with an area of 24,595 km2 comprising the districts of Kottayam(excluding Vaikom), Alappuzha(excluding Cherthala), Pathanamthitta, Kollam, and Thiruvananthapuram in Kerala, and also Kanyakumari district in Tamil Nadu. It is one of the largest Catholic dioceses in India in terms of area.
Paippad is a vibrant Census Town and Gram Panchayat in the Changanassery Taluk of the Kottayam District in the Indian state of Kerala. It is part of the Changanassery urban agglomeration.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thrikodithanam Mahavishnu Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thrikodithanam Mahavishnu Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thrikodithanam Mahavishnu Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (81 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (66 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thrikodithanam Mahavishnu Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thrikodithanam Mahavishnu Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thrikodithanam Mahavishnu Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thrikodithanam Mahavishnu Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thrikodithanam Mahavishnu Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thrikkodithanam, Kalarickal Manikanda Swami Temple, Paippad Puthenkavu Bhagavathi Temple, Muttar, Perunna Subrahmanya Swami Temple.
